title: Senior Teacher - Pearson India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pearson India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
